state.next-action: `18-06` remains active, but the layout-tab/runtime reorder path is now stabilized around persistent section identity instead of transient indexes. The composer now resolves live block editing paths from section identity, assigns `_uuid` to new and duplicated layout blocks, keeps the hero pinned at the front of normalized page layouts, and no longer auto-scrolls canvas sections during move actions. Build and focused composer integration checks are green. The next execution pass should stay inside the simplified page-local model and finish the remaining risk area: reliable media replacement and selected-block editing across hero/service/media blocks, plus a follow-up on the existing isolated production-browser save-draft expectation before calling browser verification complete. Supporting notes remain in `.planning/todos/2026-04-07-layout-first-page-model-hero-block.md`, `.planning/todos/2026-04-07-instant-quote-app-block.md`, `.planning/todos/2026-04-07-composer-media-target-model.md`, `.planning/todos/2026-04-08-cms-route-gating-and-block-actions.md`, and `.planning/todos/2026-04-08-resend-delivery-and-customer-email-verification.md`.
